Very enjoyable puzzler, this! Lots of laughs in a cartoonish atmosphere. All good things must end, unfortunately, but this game was well worth the price of admission for a pleasant hour of head-scratching and chuckles. Recommended!

Amazing graphics,good game,nice puzzles
Takes like 34minutes to finish it 👍
Recommend it a lot
Fun game to play. Worth the price.

From the graphics, to the ease of use, to entertainment, it all fits perfectly into an hour or so great experience. 
The immersion is great, meaning I really feel I am in an elevator and going from floor to floor. 
Solving the simple puzzles are never taxing or straining but keep you sufficiently occupied and motivated
I say magnificent because everything works beautifully and in harmony with each other to make a terrific experience. 
And ofcourse finally no motion sickness and no having to turn your head, so thoroughly relaxing aswell
A masterpiece!
You finish the game around an hour or so which is fine. I loved the style of puzzles they had all around good game.
My husband an I loved this puzzle!! No numbers an codes, just a fun situation with excellent graphics! I highly recommend.  I want more levels and challenges!!

So many times i got so stuck that i assumed it had a glitch and rebooted.. but then it would strike me!  Really gotta remember to think outside the box on this one for sure!  Step outside the linear mind and its a blast.  Ending is quite satisfying.
This game is amazing really wish it was on quest tho

I'd say overall it wasn't the worst experience I've had with my Oculus go, but it also wasn't close to the best, I'd say it's a 2/5 just because it was more of a really short demo than an actual game, it didn't have any depth beyond "do this exact thing in this exact way to complete the game" 

Get virtual virtual reality and save your money

Every gaming library needs a few light-hearted, whimsical titles to catch your breath from the epic scale, violence, or mind-numbing difficulty of other experiences. This is that game. I didn’t expect much when I picked it up on a Daily Deal, but for a mere $3, I was pleasantly surprised. The graphics and characters (and premise, for that matter) recall the endearing style of Pixar animations. In fact, this title better captures that style and vibe better than any actual Disney-produced VR title to date. The gameplay is simple enough for bigger kids to pick up on, but challenging enough for adults to enjoy as well. In all, it is a great game for the whole family, and you’d have to be pretty jaded to resist its charms. Tons of fun.
It's a good game you should buy it

Really really fun! Easy to play. One big giant puzzle solving game traveling floor to floor trying to figure it out. You can be seated in your fav chair and be in that elevator for a while!
A wish the creators would come up with a chapter 2! 
Replay value: I really don’t see a point going back to play through it again but the time I had playing this was amazing!
This is a great game and I highly recommend it but it’s pretty short so keep that in mind when getting this game

reviews.review_title: Great game for beginners to vr
reviews.review_description: A fun and silly puzzle game that is a great start to people trying out be for the first time

So I watched a youtuber a while ago playing this game on vr. I just got a new oculus go, so it was the first game I bought. IT WAS SO FUN!! It’s like a puzzle and you have to go to different rooms to get items to put in other rooms. Some of the other reviews complained that it was to short and I have to say I agree with them. Despite it being an awesome game, I do wish it would have been longer. I still rate it five star though because I can play it over and over again. I would recommend this to anybody!
Is Nice.
Bought this for my kids to try out and they really enjoy it !
